050A.name: Secure Money Intelligence Foundation
050A.purpose: Reusable security chips, source confidence, secure documents, Tower routing, receipts, final review, calm money mode, and money focus foundation.

050B.name: Employee Document Vault Wiring
050B.purpose: Employee W-2, W-4, I-9, pay stubs, direct deposit form, handbook signature routing, Tower change receipts, secure download warnings, and access receipt trail.

050B_REPAIR_MOUNT.name: Mount Employee Document Vault Preview
050B_REPAIR_MOUNT.purpose: Safely mount Pack 050B employee document vault preview underneath the existing app.

050C.name: Manager Meld Panel
050C.purpose: Manager = employee portal + manager schedule-to-payroll tools, manager ID, employee ID, receipts, escalation, and secure employee document vault access.

050C_REPAIR_TOWER_OPEN_ONLY.name: Tower Opens The Teller Only
050C_REPAIR_TOWER_OPEN_ONLY.purpose: Make The Teller require Tower clearance and remove casual Employee/Manager/Owner tab access.

050C_REPAIR_VISUAL_SHELL.name: Visual Shell Fix
050C_REPAIR_VISUAL_SHELL.purpose: Give The Teller its own styled Tower-gated shell so it does not render as plain left-aligned text.

050C_REPAIR_STYLE_INNER_PANELS.name: Style Inner Employee and Manager Panels
050C_REPAIR_STYLE_INNER_PANELS.purpose: Style the inner Employee and Manager panels so they render as designed cards, grids, buttons, chips, document vaults, and receipt sections instead of plain text.

050D_A.name: Owner Money Foundation
050D_A.purpose: Create owner money data, whimsical themes, business money lanes, owner queue, trust snapshot, protected MrkTrade lane, skincare money-only lane, and calm mode seed without mounting UI yet.

050D_B.name: Owner Visual Workspace and Theme Closet
050D_B.purpose: Mount the owner money workspace behind Tower owner clearance with whimsical themes, Today’s Money Focus, snapshot cards, business lanes, calm mode, and protected MrkTrade handling.

050D_C_FOCUS_BOARD_PREVIEW.name: Owner Anti-List Focus Board Preview
050D_C_FOCUS_BOARD_PREVIEW.purpose: Replace the list-heavy owner dashboard with a focus-board preview: large priority focus, business orbit, grouped constellations, quiet snapshot ribbon, and calm mode.

050D_C_REPAIR_PRIORITY_LAYOUT.name: Owner Focus Board Priority Layout Repair
050D_C_REPAIR_PRIORITY_LAYOUT.purpose: Fix Start Here priority card layout so text stays readable and the amount panel no longer crowds the right side.

050D_C_REPAIR_URGENT_MATTERS.name: Owner Urgent Matters Clarity Repair
050D_C_REPAIR_URGENT_MATTERS.purpose: Rename Start Here to Most Urgent Matters and replace the unclear bottom amount strip with due, money involved, and next move priority context.

050D_C_REPAIR_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_SWITCH.name: Owner Business Specific Switch
050D_C_REPAIR_BUSINESS_SPECIFIC_SWITCH.purpose: Make business orbit selection control the business-specific workspace, actions, items, snapshot focus, and lower sections.

050D_C_ADD_OWNER_THEMES.name: Add More Owner Themes
050D_C_ADD_OWNER_THEMES.purpose: Add more whimsical owner-only themes to the private Tower-opened owner money workspace.

050D_D_SETTINGS_CORNER_AND_CALM_MODE.name: Settings Corner and Calm Mode in Settings
050D_D_SETTINGS_CORNER_AND_CALM_MODE.purpose: Move owner settings into a corner drawer and move Calm Money Mode into settings so the main owner workspace stays clear.

050D_E_OWNER_ACTION_RECEIPTS.name: Owner Action Receipts and Final Review
050D_E_OWNER_ACTION_RECEIPTS.purpose: Add final action previews, owner receipts, and click behavior for owner workspace actions so buttons feel real.

050D_F_OWNER_GUIDANCE_POLISH.name: Owner Guidance Polish
050D_F_OWNER_GUIDANCE_POLISH.purpose: Add visible workflow guidance so the owner dashboard clearly shows what to touch and in what order.

050D_G_OWNER_REVIEW_DESK.name: Owner Review Desk
050D_G_OWNER_REVIEW_DESK.purpose: Add big-picture plus small-picture review desk with manager view, clock-in cards, proof cards, pay impact, approve/hold/request proof/send Tower actions.

050C_REPAIR_PRIMARY_VIEW.name: Make New Teller View Primary
050C_REPAIR_PRIMARY_VIEW.purpose: Stop showing the old brown app first and make the new secure Employee/Manager Teller views the primary visible app.
